title: Validate login attempt with an unverified email address
description: Ensures a user who has registered but not yet verified their email cannot fully access the application and is prompted to verify.
preconditions: A new user has completed the registration form but has not clicked the verification link.

steps.description: 1. Register a new account with a valid email and password.
2. Do not click the verification link sent to the email.
4. Enter the credentials for the newly created, unverified account.

expected_result: Login fails with an 'EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED' error. The UI clearly informs the user to check their email to verify the account and provides an option to resend the verification email.
